verses.text: Tuk laitaka vuk kia leh anlak huna guahzu bangin mihaite-a' dingin pahtawina a kilawmna omlo hi
Thu omlopi-a hong kisatna pen bangmah a hong cih theilo, khawlna mun mel a neilo, a leengsuk a leengto phialphiah tawh kibang lel hi
Sakolte sat ding kisam a, late kamkaih kisam a, mihaite zong sat ding a kisam ahi hi
Mihaite' thudotna dawngdawng lecin nang zong amau mah bangin a hai na hi hi
Mihaite a pilin a kingaihsut khaklohna dingin amau' haina tawh kizui-in dawng zaw in
Mihai khat kamtai-in a zangpa pen ama khe mah a sattantawm, siatna a zongpa ahi hi
Khebaipa' khe a kiman'na omloin a kikhai mawk bangin mihaite-a' dingin paunak in bangmah man neilo hi
Saili kuangah sailungtang khihcip lehang phattuamna a omloh bangin mihaite pahtawina zong a mawkna ahi hi
Mihaite in paunak thuhilhnate a paukhiat ciangin zukhampa in a khut-a ling om a khei dingin a kipan tawh kibang lel hi
Mihai a tuahkhak peuh tha cial-a a neipa pen a tuahkhak peuh a ban kap thal tawipa tawh kibang hi
Ui in a luak a zuatkik bangin mihaite zong a haitat ngei bangin ta kik zel hi
A pillo kimlai a pil a kisapa sangin mihaite-a' dingin lametna omzaw lai hi
Thadahpa in, “Lampi-ah humpinelkai om! Kongzingah humpinelkai om!” ci-in lumlum hi
Kongkhak pen kawmhek tungah a kiheihei lel bangin mi thadahpa a lupna tungah kiheihei hi
Thadahpa in a khutin ankuang sawksuk a, a kamah a bahtoh kik ding nangawn gim zungzung kisa hi
A kilawmin thu a dawngthei mihing sagih sangin mi thadahpa a ngaihsutna-ah pil kisa zaw hi
Eite tawh a kisailo kitotna sunga kiphumna pen ui ommuang khat a bil-in i kaihsak tawh kibang hi
A vengte a khem khit ciangin ka ciamnuihna hi, a cipa pen
sihtheihna gu a baang thaltang tawh a kappa tawh kibang hi
Sing om kei leh mei mit a, gensiatna om kei leh kitotna bei hi
Meihol in mei-am ding piangsak a, sing in mei kuangsak a, migilo in kitotna piangsak hi
Gensiatna pen a lim mahmah an tawh a kibang hi a, mihingte' sungtawng pekah tumsuk pahpah hi
Tungtham beka kam khum pauna pen cimbeng kizut leibeel tawh kibang hi
A simtat mi in a kampi bek tawh thuhoih gen a, a lungsimah zuauthu bek om hi
A lungsimah a deihhuailo thu sagih tak om ahih manin kam khum takin a pau manin umkha kei in
Ama hoihlohna a ip nop hangin mi khempeuh in ama gitlohna thei veve hi
Mi siahna-in gum a tote amau' gum tawhna sung mahah lehkiat zawsop uh a, mi a dengkha dingin suang a khukte amau' suang khuk mah in amau mah lehden'kha zaw hi
Zuaugenna in midik kimlai a mawh bangsak a, tungtham beka thugenna in siatna bek piangsak hi.
